titleStmt.title: SII 22.73: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 73. (A.R. No. 73 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA—38th YEAR.

summary.p: This records a gift of 1000 kuḻi of land in the village Nallūr Maruttuvaṉpāḍi free of all takes, for offerings to the goddess Tirukkāmakkōṭṭa-Nāchchiyār in the temple of Tāṉtōṉṟi-Āḷuḍaiyār at Vīrarājēndraśōḻapuram, by Śōḻagaṅga-Pallavaraiyaṇ Rāja[rāja*] Śiśupālaṉ of Pērāyil (the donor mentioned in No. 69 above). The village Maruttuvaṉpāḍi is said to have been a dēvadāna (?) which had been granted to the temple by one Vāṇavichchādira-Vēḷāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
. svastiśrī tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ kulottuṅkacoḻateva(r)ṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 8vatu coḻakaṅkappalla
varaiyaṉāṉa piṟavāveṉṟāṉ Irācarāca cicupālaṉeṉ virairācentira coḻapurattu Uṭaiyār tiruttāṉtoṉṟi Āḷuṭai
yanāyaṉār tirukkāmakkoṭṭa nācciyārkku Amutupaṭikku kaṟi Amutukkum māka vāṇaviccātiraveḷāṉ taṉmattil taṉmi Iṭṭa nallūr
maruttuvaṉpāṭiyil viṭṭa naṉcey nilam kuḻi 1000 Āyiramum Aṉaittāya muḷppaṭa Iṟaiyilitevatāṉamāka viṭṭu pūcaiyum Amutupa
ṭiyum cellakkaṭavatāka viṭṭeṉ perāyiluṭaiyāṉ coḻakaṅkap pallavaraiyaṉāṉa piṟavāveṉṟāṉ Irācarāca cicupālaṉeṉ Eḻuttu Itumāṟuvāṉ
keṅkaiiṭai kumariiṭai kurāṟpacu koṉṟāṉ pāvaṅkoḷvāṉ taṉ kutiraikku pulliṭum paṟaiyaṉukku taṉ miṇāṭṭiyai kuṭuppāṉ Itu śrīmāheśvara Irakṣai
Digital edition of SII 22.73 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
